summary: Fixed continual-learning indexing so only mined transcripts are marked processed, updater failures no longer advance the index and are surfaced, and default cadence is now 30 minutes.
filesChanged: extensions/continual-learning/learn.ts - track included transcripts, refresh index only on successful updater exit, return ok/stderr
extensions/continual-learning/index.ts - warn on failed updater outcomes
extensions/continual-learning/cadence.ts - lower default min minutes to 30

raw:
## Completed
Fixed continual-learning reliability bugs:
- Only indexed transcripts actually included in the updater digest.
- Index now advances only after updater exit code `0`; failures return `ok:false` and surface warnings.
- Default cadence reduced from 120 to 30 minutes.
- Added regression coverage for failed updater and transcript batching.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/continual-learning/learn.ts` - success-only index refresh, included transcript tracking, failure outcome/stderr.
- `extensions/continual-learning/index.ts` - warning notifications for failed updater outcomes.
- `extensions/continual-learning/cadence.ts` - default min minutes 30.
- `extensions/continual-learning/README.md` - updated cadence/index-flow docs.
- `extensions/continual-learning/crew/agents-memory-updater.md` - clarified updater must not edit the index.
- `extensions/continual-learning/test/cadence_test.sh` - updated default minutes assertion.
- `extensions/continual-learning/test/learn_test.sh` - added regressions for failure/no-index-advance and batching.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/continual-learning/test/cadence_test.sh && bash extensions/continual-learning/test/learn_test.sh`

## Notes
Also ran the supplied Foreman gate command; all Foreman tests passed.
